verse.name: v1
verse.lines: More like You Jesus, more like You Fill my heart with your desire To make me more like You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: More like You Jesus, more like You More like You Jesus, more like You Touch my lips with holy fire And make me more like You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, You are my mercy Lord, you are my grace All my deepest sins Have forever been erased

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Draw me in your presence Lead me in Your ways I long to bring you glory In righteousness and praise
